name: STRYKER CORP
summary: Stryker Corporation is a global medical technology company offering innovative products in MedSurg, Neurotechnology, and Orthopaedics. Key products include surgical equipment, endoscopic systems, patient handling equipment, Mako robotic-arm assisted technology, joint replacement implants, neurovascular devices, and AI-assisted virtual care platforms. Products are sold in approximately 61 countries, serving doctors, hospitals, and healthcare facilities, impacting more than 150 million patients annually.

products.name: Mako SmartRobotics
products.description: Robotic-arm assisted technology for total knee, total hip, partial knee, and shoulder arthroplasty procedures.

products.name: LIFEPAK 35
products.description: Next-generation monitor/defibrillator with Glasgow 30.4 algorithm, cprINSIGHT, 15-lead monitoring, and wireless connectivity.

products.name: 1788 Camera Platform
products.description: 4K endoscopic camera platform supporting urology, neurology, ENT, arthroscopy, and ICG visualization.

products.name: Vocera Sync Badge
products.description: Hands-free clinician communication endpoint providing real-time alerts and Smart Hospital workflow integration.

products.name: Connected OR IP BRAVoE
products.description: Integrated OR connectivity portfolio expanding iSuite connected capabilities.

products.name: Broadway System
products.description: Fully integrated stroke solution for large- and super-bore catheter procedures.

products.name: Surpass Elite Flow Diverting Stent
products.description: Flow diverting stent designed to reduce thrombin generation compared to unmodified stents.

products.name: OptaBlate BVN
products.description: Radiofrequency nerve ablation system for accessing and ablating basivertebral nerve to treat vertebrogenic pain.

products.name: Steri-Shield 8
products.description: Lightweight, customizable OR personal protection system with improved visibility, cooling, and battery performance.

products.name: Mako 4 Platform
products.description: Advanced robotics platform with QGuidance technology enabling new hardware/software capabilities across subspecialties.

products.name: Blueprint Planning Software
products.description: Shoulder arthroplasty planning software integrated into the Mako Shoulder application.

products.name: AI-assisted Virtual Care Platform
products.description: Clinical communication and artificial intelligence-assisted virtual care platform technology within the Medical division.
